ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  Asian Granito India Limited (AGIL) has completed the internal transfer of its 26% equity stakes in AGL Proteins Private Limited and Allomex Steel Private Limited to its wholly-owned subsidiary, AGL Industries Limited. This transaction reorganizes the group structure, making the two companies associates of the subsidiary rather than AGIL directly, but does not alter AGIL's ultimate beneficial ownership or control. There are no immediate material financial impacts or red flags associated with this internal group reorganization.
